name: Crockpot Beef Fajitas
recipeIngredient: 1 green bell pepper, cut into strips
1 red bell pepper, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the flank steak into 6 portions.
2. In a crockpot of any size, combine the meat, onion, bell peppers, jalapeno pepper, cilantro, garlic, chili powder, cumin, coriander, and salt.
3. Add the chopped tomatoes.
4. Cover and cook on low for 8-10 hours or on high for 4-5 hours.
5. Remove the meat from the crockpot and shred it using a fork.
6. Return the shredded meat to the crockpot and stir to combine.
7. To serve, spread the meat mixture onto flour tortillas.
8. Add favorite toppings such as sour cream, guacamole, shredded cheese, salsa.
9. Roll up the tortillas.
